scenarios.starting_prompt: Please read the schema of the BigQuery table bigquery-public-data.ml_datasets.penguins. Don't be chatty, just go straight to the answer.
binary_rubric: Verify that the agent listed the table columns species, island, culmen_length_mm, culmen_depth_mm, flipper_length_mm, body_mass_g, sex.

scenarios.starting_prompt: Show the table schema columns again, but reversed in a pure conversational text/markdown table format. Do NOT generate or offer any SQL views or queries, but strictly show the schema table in text. Don't be chatty, go straight to the answer.
binary_rubric: Verify that the agent successfully reversed the columns order in a conversational text/table format, showing sex first and species last.

scenarios.starting_prompt: In my Dataform workspace, create a new SQLX view called `simple_constant_view` that selects a constant value (1 as value). Put it in `definitions/simple_constant_view.sqlx` and write it to the workspace. Go straight to the answer.
conversation_plan: Verify that the agent confirms it has written the file simple_constant_view.sqlx.
binary_rubric: Verify that the agent's response indicates it has created the file successfully in the workspace.
